subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort in Rajasthan was built by Maharaja Kumbha in the early 16th century?
question_hi: राजस्थान में महाराजा कुम्भी ने पूर्वी 16वें श्रमिका कोणत्या संतानी फोट निवेदनी किसीसी में बनाया गया था?
explanation_en: Amber Fort was built by Maharaja Man Singh I of Kumbhalgarh in the early 16th century.
explanation_hi: अंबर फोट महाराजा कुम्बलगढ़ में बनाया गया था इसका बनाया गया राजा मनसिंग एस खंडगांवर का खाना क्या बनाया गया था?
explanation_en: Amber Fort was built by Maharaja Mansingh I of Amber. It is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. The other options mentioned, Monsoon Palace (B), Kumbhalgarh Fort (C), and Kumbhalgarh Fort (D), are either located in different regions of Rajasthan or not related to Rajasthan history.
explanation_hi: अंबर फोट महाराजा मन्सिंग एस के संतरांजली सी के बना गया था। उसका जमीन जंग्या में राजा। उनके बाद, अर्थ में सिंग्या के अन्या सी के बना गया था।
question_en: Which famous fort was built by Maharaja Mansingh I and is located in Jaipur?
question_hi: महाराजा मन्सिंगी के बना गया था। उसने जमीन जंगी के बाद, उनके बाद, जमीन जंगी के बना गया था।
explanation_en: Amber Fort, also known as Amer Fort, was built by Maharaja Mansingh I and is located in Jaipur.
explanation_hi: अंबर फोट, अमेर फोट, महाराजा मनसिंगी एमबार
question_en: Which famous fort and palace was built by Maharaja Mansingh I and is located between Amber and Amer?
question_hi: महाराजा मनसिंगी एमबार के बेंगी एमबार के बेंगी एमबार
explanation_en: Maharaja Mansingh I built Amber Fort and Palace between Amber and Amer.
question_en: Maharaja Mansingh I built a palace and fort between Amber and Amer.
explanation_en: Maharaja Mansingh I built the Amber Fort and Amer Fort between Amber and Amer.
